title: Reunion Weekend Collapse
theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
omen: a florist delivery nobody ordered arriving already open

starter_premise.title: Reunion Weekend Collapse
starter_premise.premise: Old friends reunite and one hidden secret unravels everybody.
starter_premise.signature_tell: The county telegraphs the problem once and nobody listens until act three.

props: locked room key on an optimistic keychain

cast.name: Wyatt Mercer
traits: says she is fine in a voice that needs legal counsel
works too hard to notice the affair until everyone else does
keeps a color-coded calendar and a cracked heart
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands

cast.name: Cole Winterson
traits: mistakes refusal for intrigue
knows routines he should not know
says forever too early
secret_capacity: thinks apology gifts erase documentary evidence
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence
cast.suspicion_profile: appears trustworthy under pendant lighting only

cast.name: Mara Hale
traits: says the dangerous thing out loud
appears exactly when gossip is needed
drinks aggressively
secret_capacity: knows about a half sibling no one asked for
may die first or survive unbelievably
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands
cast.space_description: unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files
cast.suspicion_profile: can host Thanksgiving but could move a body-shaped rug

cast.name: Gavin Vale
traits: smiles like a restraining order is considering her
has slept four hours across a week
says he would not stop in a way nobody enjoys hearing twice

bought bleach for innocent reasons that no longer sound innocent

cast.space_description: meditation annex nobody uses in winter
cast.suspicion_profile: appears trustworthy under pendant lighting only

cast.regional_responsibility: organizes a fundraiser with tense undertones

beat_sheet.text: The engine is information asymmetry from the start: Old friends reunite and one hidden secret unravels everybody. Somebody already knows more than Wyatt Mercer, and the county intends to profit from that gap. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.00.

Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Wyatt Mercer hesitates before explaining toolshed described as just storage. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.07. A phone vibrates from inside the wall.

Act one ends with the gap established clearly enough to create pursuit but not enough to settle blame. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.31.

Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Mara Hale hesitates before explaining unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files. The ally beat is really about information custody: who now holds the dangerous version of events and whether they can survive holding it. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.72. Someone who should be dead appears at brunch.

Act two ends with Wyatt Mercer close enough to the truth to be dangerous but still one beat behind the person who shaped the narrative first. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Gavin Vale hesitates before explaining meditation annex nobody uses in winter. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.84.

The reveal clarifies not just what happened but who benefited from everyone misreading the information gap in the first place. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. A chase, drive, or locked-room pivot near the gazebo at Lake Mercy forces the remaining information into motion instead of theory. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.25.

The confrontation settles the visible gap, but the emotional cost depends on how much truth arrived too late. Gavin Vale hesitates before explaining meditation annex nobody uses in winter. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.41. Someone who should be dead appears at brunch.

The ending decides whether the asymmetry closes cleanly or leaves one last opening in the county's memory. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.58. The ceramic owl is back on the kitchen island.

contradiction_ledger.entry: Cole Winterson is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
Wyatt Mercer says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

dialogue_samples: "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Cole?"
"Mothers do not disappear, Wyatt. They evaporate into paperwork."
"I checked his social media likes, Wyatt. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
"The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
"Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Gavin."
"You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
"If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
"I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
"Honey, ever since the accident, your anxiety has been so high. Did you take your pills?"
"That pool was supposed to make us look safe, and somehow it became a witness."
"He keeps calling it stress like stress knows my garage code."
"If she is the nanny, why is she wearing my robe like a legal argument?"
fake_critic_blurb: "Reunion Weekend Collapse understands that menace is a regional utility." - County Suspense Quarterly
sequel_hook: Channel 8 Night Report hints that the vineyard fire had a witness who still hosts brunch.
synopsis: Inspired by true events in the emotional sense only, "Reunion Weekend Collapse" follows Wyatt Mercer, a high-output betrayed wife caught inside protective mother vs manipulative co-parent before she understood where the gap had already opened. Cole Winterson collides with her life carrying portable suspicion, plausible access to offsite storage, and the kind of calm that sounds premeditated in a dim kitchen. The governing injury is simple: Old friends reunite and one hidden secret unravels everybody. The signature tell is always this: The county telegraphs the problem once and nobody listens until act three. As a florist delivery nobody ordered arriving already open, what she cannot yet see becomes the syntax of the whole county, and every withheld fact keeps breathing just ahead of her. Every town has a basement.
